response: Imagine you’ve got a damaged red electrical plug from the US that’s slightly bent. You need to plug it into one of three different wall sockets: one with round pins, another with flat pins, or a third with three pins. Which socket will it fit into?

meta.system: Reword this puzzle in a different natural style, SAME facts, SAME question. Reply ONLY the reworded text.
meta.user: You have a bent red US plug. Put it into one of these wall sockets: the round-pin socket, the flat-pin socket, or the three-pin socket. Which one?
